NPs compositiona: a The amounts of MB and PLGA were always maintained at 0.5 mg and 20 mg, respectively. The amount of SC6OH was changed from 10 to 40 mg. b NPs were prepared with the nanoprecipitation/solvent displacement method using acetone as the organic phase. c NPs were prepared with the W/O/W emulsion/solvent evaporation method using a mixture of acetone/dichloromethane (1 : 1, v/v) as the organic phase; Tween 80 and Pluronic F68® were used as surfactants.
